22.gl: illumination or (concrete) luminary (in every sense, including lightning, happiness, etc.)
22.kj: bright, clear, [phrase] day, light (-ning), morning, sun.

22.gl: the dark; hence (literally) darkness; figuratively, misery, destruction, death, ignorance, sorrow, wickedness
shade of death, i.e. the grave (figuratively, calamity)

23.gl: properly, to wander away, i.e. lose oneself; by implication to perish (causative, destroy)
23.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

23.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
23.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

23.gl: to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists)
23.kj: bestow, bring, govern, guide, lead (forth), put, straiten.

23.gl: to grow, i.e. (causatively) to enlarge, (figuratively) laud

23.kj: all abroad, enlarge, spread, stretch out.

24.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
24.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

24.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
24.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
24.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

24.kj: be(-head), bring, call back, decline, depart, eschew, get (you), go (aside), [idiom] grievous, lay away (by), leave undone, be past, pluck away, put (away, down), rebel, remove (to

24.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
24.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

24.gl: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both
24.kj: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

24.gl: a desolation (of surface), i.e. desert; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain
24.kj: confusion, empty place, without form, nothing, (thing of) nought, vain, vanity, waste, wilderness.
24.dv: from an unused root meaning to lie waste;

25.gl: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both
25.kj: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

25.gl: illumination or (concrete) luminary (in every sense, including lightning, happiness, etc.)
25.kj: bright, clear, [phrase] day, light (-ning), morning, sun.

25.gl: the dark; hence (literally) darkness; figuratively, misery, destruction, death, ignorance, sorrow, wickedness
